caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a wall of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a black logo that reads "Authentic" with smaller text above it. A professional silver microphone on a black boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts as he speaks into the microphone. He begins with his eyes closed and mouth slightly open, then opens his eyes and smiles, revealing his teeth. He then transitions to a more neutral expression with his mouth open as he continues talking, and finally looks slightly to his left with a focused expression. His tattooed arm is partially visible on the left side of the frame.
